data.title: test-gate-status is a single file overwritten by each record-test-status.sh call
data.description: Multi-file commits fail the test gate because each record-test-status.sh call overwrites the single test-gate-status file. The pre-commit gate checks ALL staged source files but only finds the LAST recorded test. Observed during w22-jucp batch 4 (4 source files in one commit). Fix: per-source-file status entries.
